title: commitlint-scope configuration
description: Configuration for commitlint-scope - a linter that checks if declared commit scopes match the changed files.

scopeRegex.description: Regular expression used to extract the scope from a conventional commit header. It must contain a named group 'scope'. If omitted, a sensible default is used. https://github.com/google/re2/wiki/Syntax

patterns.description: List of pattern rules. Each rule maps a list of scope names to a list of glob patterns.

scopes.description: List of scope names that share these glob patterns.

files.description: List of glob patterns that match files belonging to the listed scopes. Patterns support globstars (**) and standard wildcards.
